title: Neath's Love Story: Tomorrow Again
original_title: រឿងស្នេហារបស់នេត ២
overview: Neang Neath was accused by the villagers of being involved with the bandits after her husband went to hide. Leader Vong attempted to assault her until she died, while Dao was hiding until he was victorious.
